style="">2</sup></font></b></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="100" x="30" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-13" edge="1" parent="1" target="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=none;" value="<span style="font-size: 15px;"><b>Compute f(x+h)</b></span><div><span style="font-size: 15px;">f(3.001) = 9.006</span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="400" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-14" edge="1" parent="1" source="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-5" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=none;" value="<span style="font-size: 15px;"><b>Compute f(x-h)</b></span><div><span style="font-size: 15px;">f(2.999) = 8.994</span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="400" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-15" edge="1" parent="1" source="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-6" target="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=none;" value="<span style="font-size: 15px;"><b>f'(3) = </b>(9.006-8.994)/(2*0.001)</span><div><span style="font-size: 15px;">= 6.0</span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="610" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-17" edge="1" parent="1" source="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-7" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=none;" value="<span style="font-size: 15px;"><b>Compare</b></span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="850" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-16" edge="1" parent="1" source="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-8" target="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="820" y="160" /> <mxPoint x="820" y="240" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-8" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE5F3;strokeColor=none;" value="<span style="font-size: 15px;"><b>Exact derivative</b></span><div><span style="font-size: 15px;"><b>f' = 2x = 6.0</b></span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="600" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4dyxcnajOMZQsO3b4pzu-9" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DCFFD8;strokeColor=none;" value="<span style="font-size: 15px;"><b>Autodiff is correct</b></span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="980" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
